/usr/bin/ar qc libbseal_core.a CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/app/BsealApp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/app/CoreApi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/app/SelfTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/cli/Args.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/crypto/AesGcmBackend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/crypto/Kdf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/crypto/KeySchedule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/crypto/SecureBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/crypto/XChaCha20Poly1305Backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/archive/ArchiveReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/archive/ArchiveWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/archive/PathSanitizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/archive/RecordFormat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/archive/SafeOutputTree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/io/AsyncReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/io/AsyncWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/io/BufferPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/io/ShardFrame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/io/ShardReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/io/ShardWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/io/StdoutShardWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/pipeline/DecryptPipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/pipeline/EncryptPipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/platform/CpuFeatures.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/platform/DurableFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/platform/MemoryLock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/platform/PassphrasePrompt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/platform/ProcessMemoryLock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_core.dir/src/platform/Random.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libbseal_core.a
